generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a fellow concerned citizen, I want to share why I support strengthening our domestic security powers. We've seen how fragile our systems can be, and we owe it to our families to ensure law enforcement has the tools they need to keep us safe. Some worry about civil liberties, but responsible expansion - with proper oversight - is about balancing security and freedom. Our duty is to protect what we value, and that starts with giving our brave officers the support they deserve. #SecureOurFuture #DutyFirst
